title: Valid Accounts
description: Hunt for suspicious use of otherwise valid credentials across identity and SIEM telemetry.
hypothesis_templates: A valid user account is being used outside its normal access patterns or locations.
Low-noise session anomalies across identity and SIEM telemetry indicate credential misuse.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Tenant, business unit, or environment selector.

parameters.name: lookback_hours
parameters.description: Hours of identity and SIEM telemetry to review.

parameters.name: focus_user
parameters.description: Optional user identifier to prioritize during the hunt.

telemetry_requirements.description: Interactive and non-interactive sign-in visibility with risk, device, and location context.
Session and alert correlation that can tie identity anomalies to downstream activity.

blind_spots: Shadow identity providers or unmanaged SaaS may create account activity outside the covered telemetry set.
Long-lived federated sessions can reduce the fidelity of fresh sign-in evidence.

execution_targets.name: Okta anomalous session review
execution_targets.description: Inspect System Log events for unusual user, device, IP, or policy combinations.

execution_targets.name: M365 risky sign-in sweep
execution_targets.description: Review risky or unusual sign-ins in Entra ID / Microsoft 365 identity telemetry.

execution_targets.name: Splunk identity to downstream activity pivot
execution_targets.description: Correlate suspicious identity events with downstream alerts or access activity.
execution_targets.query_template: index=identity tenant={{tenant}} earliest=-{{lookback_hours}}h user={{focus_user}} | transaction user maxspan=8h

notes: This pack is a strong starting point for suspicious login or session-use leads.
